title: mongo-agg-profiler
pitch: MongoDB aggregation profiler that explains pipelines and suggests indexing improvements.
keyFeatures: Run and parse aggregate() explain plans into readable summaries
Index suggestion engine based on match/sort stages and winning plan
Compare before/after explains and output a diff report
Export reports as JSON/Markdown for PR reviews
targetUsers: Backend engineers optimizing MongoDB aggregations who need actionable performance hints from real explain output.
